task:
Build a home inventory system in the Obsidian vault at /home/user/Documents/HomeInventory.

1. Create folders: 'Rooms', 'Items', 'Warranties'.
2. Create 'Rooms/Living Room.md' with frontmatter `type: room`, `floor: 1`, body with heading 'Living Room', a description, a link to [[TV Samsung 55]], and tags #room #livingroom.
3. Create 'Rooms/Kitchen.md' with frontmatter `type: room`, `floor: 1`, body with heading 'Kitchen', a description, a link to [[Refrigerator LG]], and tags #room #kitchen.
4. Create 'Items/TV Samsung 55.md' with frontmatter `type: item`, `brand: Samsung`, `value: 800`, body with heading 'TV Samsung 55', a description, links to [[Living Room]] and [[TV Warranty]], and tags #item #electronics.
5. Create 'Items/Refrigerator LG.md' with frontmatter `type: item`, `brand: LG`, `value: 1200`, body with heading 'Refrigerator LG', a description, links to [[Kitchen]] and [[Fridge Warranty]], and tags #item #appliance.
6. Create 'Warranties/TV Warranty.md' with frontmatter `type: warranty`, `expires: 2027-03-15`, body with heading 'TV Warranty', warranty details, a link to [[TV Samsung 55]], and tags #warranty #electronics.
7. Create 'Warranties/Fridge Warranty.md' with frontmatter `type: warranty`, `expires: 2028-06-01`, body with heading 'Fridge Warranty', warranty details, a link to [[Refrigerator LG]], and tags #warranty #appliance.

verification.description: Living Room links to TV Samsung 55
TV Samsung 55 links to Living Room
TV Samsung 55 links to TV Warranty
Refrigerator LG links to Fridge Warranty
TV Warranty links to TV Samsung 55
